heading: Special provisions relating to surviving spouses
label: 1304 Special provisions relating to surviving spouses
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. children.text: before the expiration of fifteen years after the termination of the period of service in which the injury or disease causing the death of the veteran was incurred or aggravated; or
for one year or more; or
for any period of time if a child was born of the marriage, or was born to them before the marriage.
